title: 2024 City of Cordova Water Quality Report
summary: The City of Cordova’s 2024 Water Quality Report is now available. This annual report details where your water comes from, how it’s treated, and how it measures up to federal and state safety standards. We’re proud to share that Cordova’s water continues to meet or exceed all regulatory requirements....

title: Jon Bittner Named 2025 Achievement in Business Leadership Honoree
summary: The Alaska Small Business Development Center is proud to announce that Executive Director Jon Bittner has been named a 2025 Achievement in Business Leadership honoree by the Alaska Journal of Commerce . title: US Senate panel grills Trump CDC nominee on vaccines
summary: Susan Monarez, President Donald Trump’s nominee to be the director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, testifies during her confirmation hearing before the U.S. Senate Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions on June 25, 2025. title: AST Death Investigation: Kenny Lake [AK25061293]
summary: On 06/25/2025 at approximately 0134 hours Glennallen AST responded to a report of a suicide in Kenny Lake. Investigation revealed that a 16-year-old male died from apparent suicide. Next of Kin was on scene. The remains have been sent to the State Medical Examiner's Office for autopsy.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Judge orders more review of dam risks at planned Western Alaska gold mine
summary: Yereth Rosen Alaska Beacon Developers of the Donlin Gold mine in Western Alaska must pause some of its construction while government agencies correct deficiencies that led to flawed permits for the controversial project, a federal judge has ruled. U.S. District Court Juge Sharon Gleason on June 9 ordered the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers and U.S. Bureau of Land Management to analyze the possibility of a catastrophic dam failure and, if necessary, withdraw or modify the permits they already issued to Donlin Gold LLC, the project’s developer. The order stems from a lawsuit fil...

title: AST Misuse of Plates: Fairbanks [AK25060563]
summary: On 06/23/2025 at 0332 hours a Trooper was on routine patrol and observed an occupied pickup in the parking lot of the Alaska Club bearing incorrect plates. title: AST Trespass, Assault: North Pole [AK25061297]
summary: On June 25, 2025, Troopers responded to a report about an unwanted person on his property. They contacted Jade Herbert, who was holding a bottle of R&R whiskey. When Troopers attempted to detain her, Jade pulled away and threw the bottle at Troopers, splashing liquid into his eyes and causing pain.....
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST MVC-D Commercial Vehicle: Cooper Landing, AK [AK25061281]
summary: On 6/25/2025 at approximately 0047 hours, Alaska State Troopers responded to a reported rollover crash involving a tractor hauling double trailers near milepost 53.5 Sterling Highway. Investigation revealed an adult male was driving a gray 2007 Kenworth tractor with the double trailers, when he lost...

title: Alaska Sen. Sullivan proposes billions in new missile defense spending, a step toward Trump goal
summary: During Flight Test Other-26a, or FTX-26a, a target developed by the Missile Defense Agency was air-launched over the northern Pacific Ocean on Monday, June 23, 2025.
